formats.name: AI Literacy Workshop
formats.valueProp: Practical AI literacy for teams who need to understand and use AI tools without the hype. Designed for non-technical professionals. Keyona facilitates live, no canned slides.
contentOutline: What AI actually is (and isn't) — cutting through the noise
Live tool demos with real business use cases
Where AI breaks and how to catch it
Q&A and custom use case workshop
formats.coHostAngle: Can be co-delivered with an internal L&D team or branded for a specific accelerator or institution. Keyona handles facilitation, partner handles logistics and audience.

formats.name: AI Automation Audit
formats.valueProp: A structured process audit that identifies what is and isn't worth automating in a small business or team. Delivers a prioritized roadmap, not a vendor pitch.
contentOutline: Automation opportunity scoring by ROI and complexity
Written report with 3-5 prioritized automation opportunities
Optional: implementation retainer for top-priority items
formats.coHostAngle: Positioned as the entry point to a consulting retainer. The audit builds trust and defines the scope before any implementation begins.

formats.name: Keynote: The Humanist Case for AI
formats.valueProp: A talk that centers humans in the AI conversation — not as victims of automation, not as naive optimists, but as the people who decide what these tools are for. Built for conferences that want a counternarrative.
contentOutline: Why both the fear narrative and the hype narrative are missing something
What it actually means to build with AI as a founder or operator
The values layer: who decides what AI optimizes for
Practical: what this means for your team right now
formats.coHostAngle: Standalone keynote. Pairs well with a panel on AI and the future of work. Keyona brings a perspective that is hard to find: a practitioner who is also a humanist and a deconstructing believer.
